# services.pgscv

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.pgscv`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.pgscv.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable pgSCV, a PostgreSQL ecosystem metrics collector. |
| `services.pgscv.logLevel` | `one of "debug", "info", "warn", "error"` | Log level for pgSCV. |
| `services.pgscv.package` | `package` | The pgscv package to use. |
| `services.pgscv.settings` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Configuration for pgSCV, in YAML format. See [configuration reference](https://github.com/cherts/pgscv/wiki/Configuration-settings-reference). |
